violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of black residue. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The hand sink in the back prep/ware-washing area was not dispensing hot water at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Per interview of staff, utensils and equipment are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts food must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
